## Description

Please include a summary of the change and the problem it solves. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-breaking changes to docs)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes (`npm test`)
- [ ] The codebase builds successfully without any errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] My changes generate no new linter warnings (`npm run lint`)

## Screenshots / Video Recordings (if applicable)

Please attach screenshots or recordings showing the before/after behavior or UI enhancements.
